title: A Day at the Zoo
story_html:
Today I go to the zoo with my mom. We see a panda. It eats bamboo. Then we see a zebra. It has black and white stripes.

Wild animals do not live with people. They live in a habitat. It has grass and trees.

At the zoo, my dad buys a snack for me. It is delicious! It is my favorite.

At school, I have a classmate. She is kind. We play at the playground. We have fun.

kind.def: Friendly, caring, and helpful to others.

panda.def: A black and white animal that eats bamboo.

zebra.def: An animal that looks like a horse with black and white stripes.

wild.def: Living in nature, not kept by people.

habitat.def: The natural place where an animal lives.

snack.def: A small amount of food eaten between meals.

favorite.def: Liked more than all the others.

classmate.def: A student who is in the same class as you.

playground.def: An outdoor area at school where children play.

questions.explain: B — the story says the panda eats bamboo.

questions.qtext: In "They live in a habitat," what does habitat mean?
options: the natural place where an animal lives
questions.explain: B — habitat means the natural place where an animal lives.

questions.qtext: What does dad buy at the zoo?
questions.explain: C — dad buys a snack for the child.

questions.qtext: In "It is delicious!" what does delicious mean?
questions.explain: B — delicious means having a very good taste.

questions.qtext: Who does the child play with at the playground?
questions.explain: D — the child plays with a classmate at the playground.
